parameters-en.Drive: Controls the amount of distortion and saturation applied to the signal.
parameters-en.Level: Controls the level of the overdriven signal.
parameters-en.Blend: Blends in the overdriven signal with the dry, unprocessed signal. At 0.0, no effect is heard.
parameters-en.Grunt: Boosts or cuts low frequencies of the distorted signal. Does not affect the sound when set to "Flat."
parameters-en.Attack: Boosts or cuts high frequencies of the distorted signal. Does not affect the sound when set to "Flat."
parameters-en.Master: Sets the overall level of the block.
parameters-en.Bass: Controls the level of the bass EQ band sent into the distortion.
parameters-en.Lo MidFreq: Sets the frequency of the low mid EQ band sent into the distortion.
parameters-en.Lo Mid: Controls the level of the low mid EQ band sent into the distortion.
parameters-en.Hi MidFreq: Sets the frequency of the high mid EQ band sent into the distortion.
parameters-en.Hi Mid: Controls the level of the high mid EQ band sent into the distortion.
parameters-en.Treble: Controls the level of the treble EQ band sent into the distortion.
parameters-en.Distortion: Turns the distortion circuit on and off. When off, the EQ parameters remain active.
